body.title: Smoke tests: queue → Granny routing → cc_task_listener dispatch
body.result: 7 green tests in tests/granny/: routing edges, route_ticket→GRANNY_DISPATCH, poll_once→in_progress Postgres integration
body.description:
Pre-Monday validation: verify the full ticket-dispatch chain. File a ticket → Granny picks it up and routes it → cc_task_listener sees the GRANNY_DISPATCH message and marks it in_progress. This is the chain that broke before (missing 'tests' routing edge, cc_task_listener not started) — verify all three stages are solid.

**Affected files:** tests/granny/, lab/claudecode/cc_task_listener.py, devices/granny/daemon.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Granny routing uses _DEFAULT_ROUTING dict in devices/granny/device.py
**Scope boundary:** IN — happy-path end-to-end: file → route → dispatch → in_progress; OUT — Granny escalation path, multi-worker routing
**Completion criteria:** integration test: a ticket filed with a known tag (e.g. 'Platform') reaches in_progress status within one cc_task_listener poll cycle; test exits green
